title: Haunted Castle (Efteling)
summary: The Haunted Castle or known as Spookslot was a haunted attraction in the amusement park Efteling in the Netherlands. It was designed by Ton van de Ven and was the first attraction built outside the Fairy Tale Forest.
extract: The Haunted Castle or known as Spookslot was a haunted attraction in the amusement park Efteling in the Netherlands. It was designed by Ton van de Ven and was the first attraction built outside the Fairy Tale Forest.
